title: Executive Order 5253—Extension of Trust Period on Allotments Made to Indians of the Omaha Reservation, Nebraska
text:
It is hereby ordered, under authority contained in the act of June 21, 1906 (34 Stat. 326), that the trust period on allotments made to Indians of the Omaha Reservation in Nebraska, which period expires during the calendar year 1930, be, and is hereby extended for a period of ten years.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
December 31, 1929.
